title: corethrogyne californica var. rigida
intro: Corethrogyne californica var. rigida, also known as California everlasting or stiff corethrogyne, is a shrub in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Corethrogyne californica var. rigida include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a salve or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
